description: C++ command injection: std::getenv flows to system(). Safe version uses allowlist.

expected.notes: system(cmd) where cmd comes from std::getenv
std::getenv flows directly to system() without sanitization
AST pattern still matches system() in safe version

std::getenv at line 10 flows to system(cmd) at line 14 in execute_safe — allowlist check uses string copy but original cmd pointer still reaches sink. Exactly one finding after dedup; second cross-function leak collapses into this one.
